name: Hamid Mahdavi
role: Structural Designer | BIM & Digital Engineering Lead
description: Senior Structural Designer with more than 10 years of experience across industrial, infrastructure, and residential projects — from steelmaking and pelletizing plants to sports halls and residential towers.

At Fooladtechnic International Engineering (FIE Co.), I currently lead BIM implementation and digital engineering workflows, designing AI/ML-ready data architectures for predictive quantity estimation and establishing Common Data Environments (CDEs).

Strong track record in value engineering: one case eliminated 71 concrete piles (25 m each) by applying ACI 313-16 §6.7.2. Also experienced in Canadian codes — NBC Part 4 & 9, CSA O86 — alongside ACI, AISC, and ASCE standards.
